headline.purpose: Section titles and major conversion blocks.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, badges, nav labels, and small system markers.

shadows.name: diagram-lift
shadows.purpose: White diagrams floating inside dark command panels.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Small transforms such as CTA hover lift.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Color, border, and background state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main conversion CTA for assessment, contact, and strategy actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; background: #0b6f66; color: #ffffff; padding: 14px 36px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 0; box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(11,111,102,0.35); cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease, transform 150ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #095e57; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(11,111,102,0.30); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(11,111,102,0.22), 0 6px 24px rgba(11,111,102,0.35); }

components.name: Secondary Text Link
components.description: Quiet secondary action used beside primary CTAs.
components.css: .ds-link-secondary { font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: #1e3a5f; text-decoration: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border-bottom: 1.5px solid #1e3a5f; padding-bottom: 1px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 200ms ease, border-color 200ms ease; } .ds-link-secondary:hover { color: #0b6f66; border-bottom-color: #0b6f66; } .ds-link-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(11,111,102,0.35); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Service card with tinted header band, icon tile, capability list, and hover fill.
components.html:
MDR

Managed Detection & Response

24/7 proactive monitoring, investigation, and response support.

Learn more ->
components.css: .ds-feature-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(30,58,95,0.06); color: #1e3a5f; transition: transform 260ms ease, box-shadow 260ms ease, border-color 260ms ease; max-width: 360px; } .ds-feature-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: #0b6f66; box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(30,58,95,0.13); } .ds-feature-head { background: rgba(11,111,102,0.05); padding: 22px 26px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(11,111,102,0.13); display: flex; gap: 14px; align-items: center; transition: background 260ms ease; } .ds-feature-card:hover .ds-feature-head { background: #0b6f66; } .ds-feature-card h3 { margin: 0; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.2; color: #1e3a5f; } .ds-feature-card:hover h3 { color: #ffffff; } .ds-kicker { font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #0b6f66; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-feature-card:hover .ds-kicker { color: rgba(255,255,255,.75); } .ds-icon-tile { width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 12px; background: #ffffff; border: 1.5px solid rgba(11,111,102,.2); display: grid; place-items: center; flex: 0 0 auto; } .ds-icon-tile svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; fill: none; stroke: #0b6f66; stroke-width: 1.8; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; } .ds-feature-card:hover .ds-icon-tile { background: rgba(255,255,255,.18); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.35); } .ds-feature-card:hover .ds-icon-tile svg { stroke: #ffffff; } .ds-feature-card p { font-family: Open Sans, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.65; color: #6b7280; margin: 20px 26px 18px; } .ds-card-link { margin: 18px 26px 22px; display: inline-flex; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; color: #0b6f66; border-bottom: 1.5px solid rgba(11,111,102,.27); padding-bottom: 1px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Contact form field with teal focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; color: #1e3a5f; } .ds-field input { width: 100%; padding: 11px 14px; border: 1.5px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Open Sans, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #1e3a5f; outline: 0; transition: border-color 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-field input:focus { border-color: #0b6f66; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(11,111,102,0.12); }

components.name: Integration Chip
components.description: Circular logo container used on connector rows.
components.css: .ds-integration-chip { width: 64px; height: 64px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #eef2f6; box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(30,58,95,0.10), 0 0 0 4px #ffffff; display: grid; place-items: center; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 12px; color: #0b6f66; transition: transform 220ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease, border-color 220ms ease; } .ds-integration-chip:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); border-color: rgba(11,111,102,0.35); box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(30,58,95,0.14), 0 0 0 4px #ffffff; } .ds-integration-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(11,111,102,0.45); outline-offset: 5px; }

components.name: Command Diagram Panel
components.description: White operational artifact floating on a dark SOC panel.
components.html: SOC Operations Flow
components.css: .ds-command-wrap { background: linear-gradient(140deg, #162840 0%, #0d1b2e 48%, #061726 100%); padding: 48px; display: inline-block; } .ds-command-panel { position: relative; width: 360px; height: 190px; border-radius: 26px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.99) 0%, rgba(248,250,252,0.98) 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(45,212,191,0.46); box-shadow: 0 34px 90px rgba(0,0,0,0.38), 0 0 44px rgba(20,184,166,0.24); display: grid; place-items: center; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; color: #1e3a5f; } .ds-command-strip { position: absolute; top: -1px; left: 32px; right: 32px; height: 3px; border-radius: 9999px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #14b8a6, transparent); } .ds-command-panel:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #14b8a6; outline-offset: 6px; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Sticky white navigation with active underline and contact CTA.
components.css: .ds-nav { height: 72px; padding: 0 60px; background: #ffffff; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(30,58,95,0.08); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; font-family: Montserrat, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-nav strong { margin-right: auto; color: #1e3a5f; letter-spacing: .12em; } .ds-nav a { font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #6b7280; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; padding-bottom: 2px; } .ds-nav a:hover, .ds-nav a.ds-active { color: #1e3a5f; border-bottom-color: #0b6f66; } .ds-nav button { font: inherit; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #ffffff; background: #0b6f66; border: 0; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 11px 26px; box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(11,111,102,0.24); transition: background 200ms ease, transform 150ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-nav button:hover { background: #095e57; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(11,111,102,0.30); }

narrative.overview:
Secugram uses the visual language of a security operations floor, but filters it through a clean B2B marketing frame. The default surface is bright, structured, and reassuring; the dark command panels appear only when the page needs to show detection, monitoring, and technical depth.

The system is built around a restrained navy and teal palette. Navy carries authority, teal marks action and signal, and white or mist sections keep the page approachable for SME buyers who need security expertise without enterprise friction.
keyCharacteristics: Structured, audit-ready layouts with generous section rhythm.
Teal used as a signal color for CTAs, active states, status, and security telemetry.
Dark panels reserved for operations, SOC, diagrams, and trust moments.
Rounded, elevated cards that feel stable rather than decorative.
Technical imagery built from hexagons, grids, dotted connectors, and lifecycle diagrams.

rules.name: The Signal Rarity Rule
rules.body: Security Teal must mark action, state, or telemetry. Do not flood every heading, icon, and border with teal at once.

rules.name: The Command Surface Rule
rules.body: Deep Command belongs to operational context: hero graphics, SOC sections, trust bands, and footer. Do not turn the whole marketing page dark unless intentionally using the `dark-command` tweak variant.

rules.name: The Executive Scan Rule
rules.body: Every section must be readable by scanning the label, headline, and first sentence. Do not bury the value proposition inside dense body copy.

rules.name: The Heavy Headline Rule
rules.body: Use 800-weight Montserrat for major claims. If a heading drops to 600, the whole section should intentionally become quieter.

rules.name: The Lift With Purpose Rule
rules.body: Elevation signals interactivity, hierarchy, or a white artifact floating over a command surface. Do not apply large shadows to every neutral card.

dos: Do keep Secugram's default mode bright and reassuring, with dark command surfaces used as contrast.
Do use Security Teal for primary action, live signal, focus, and important operational markers.
Do preserve the Montserrat and Open Sans pairing unless the whole brand system is intentionally reworked.
Do keep section spacing generous: 88px to 96px vertical padding is the normal marketing rhythm.
Do use hexagons, grids, dotted connectors, and lifecycle diagrams for technical texture.
Do add missing responsive navigation and form states before treating the prototype as production.
donts: Don't use generic cybersecurity neon-on-black for the whole page. Dark surfaces must be specific to operations and diagrams.
Don't replace teal with arbitrary accent colors unless all CTA, focus, link, trust, and diagram states are updated together.
Don't use side-stripe borders as card accents. Use full borders, header bands, icon tiles, or badges.
Don't use gradient text. Secugram emphasis comes from weight, color, and structure.
Don't make every repeated item an identical icon-heading-text grid. The current system alternates cards, lifecycle steps, split panels, trust bands, and connector rows.
Don't use glassmorphism as the site aesthetic. The tweaks panel may use blur, but the public landing page should stay clean and concrete.
